commands.review_summary:
The PR changes doctor runtime tool schema validation so tool loading and schema normalization failures are reported as health findings instead of aborting the doctor check, with focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +77, Tests +141. Total +218 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main calls tool construction and normalization inside the doctor runtime schema check without local error conversion, so those exceptions abort the check. The PR adds focused tests for the three reported failure classes.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer review is needed because the PR has protected maintainer/member signals, is stacked on https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88368, and has no narrow automatable defect from this review.
